Career Planning

One of the most important steps to a successful future is choosing the right university. With this concept, Doğuş University attaches particular importance to the studies which will help the students’ career planning along with quality education.

Career Planning Centre affiliated with Student Deaconship provides the opportunity to expand students’ visions and finding the answer to their questions about the future with the help of many seminars and conferences throughout the academic year. In addition to that, “Career Days” are held every year since 2005. Thanks to Career Days which is becoming traditional with such a great sound basis and developing each year, students of Doğuş University find the opportunity to come together with the representatives of different sectors. Career Days open a new door to internship and job opportunities as well as acquiring wide knowledge and experience environment. Furthermore, Career Planning Centre offers consultancy to students when it is needed; and supports the students with preparing their resumes, internship and job applications and directing their careers in the right path.

Mandatory internships in Doğuş University’s academic program, dissertations, collaborative works which are carried on with public or private sector, national or international research projects of faculty members provide an important experience opportunity for students.
